subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: They had philosophers and great men, but while their civilization was full of beauty and was superior to that of the Romans, it was material--neither moral nor spiritual.
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization
